ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lakes" (
  "lake_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each lake */,
  "lake_name" TEXT /* Name of the lake */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the lake */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the lake */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the lake */,
  "surface_area" REAL /* Surface area of the lake */,
  "depth" REAL /* Average depth of the lake */,
  "water_quality_index" REAL /* Water quality index */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey conducted */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Type of ecosystem (e.g., freshwater, saltwater) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lake_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fish" (
  "fish_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fish */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the fish */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the fish */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the fish */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the fish */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the fish */,
  "capture_method" TEXT /* Method used to capture the fish */,
  "capture_date" TEXT /* Date the fish was captured */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the fish was released back into the wild */,
  "tag_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the fish tag */,
  "genetic_information" TEXT /* Link to genetic information (e.g., file path) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "fish_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fish being measured */,
  "lake_id" TEXT /* ID of the lake where the measurement was taken */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the measurement */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the fish at the time of measurement */,
  "radii_length_mm" REAL /* Radii length of the fish at the time of measurement */,
  "scale_length" REAL /* Scale length of the fish at the time of measurement */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the water at the time of measurement */,
  "oxygen_level" REAL /* Level of dissolved oxygen in the water */,
  "ph_level" REAL /* pH level of the water */,
  "turbidity" REAL /* Turbidity of the water */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_lake_id FOREIGN KEY ("lake_id") REFERENCES lakes ("lake_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_fish_id FOREIGN KEY ("fish_id") REFERENCES fish ("fish_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., population, habitat, behavior) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "study_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the study's findings */,
  "publications" TEXT /* List of publications resulting from the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the participant is part of */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., researcher, assistant) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the participant is affiliated with */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the participant */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the participant started participating in the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the participant ended participation in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_measurements" (
  "study_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study measurement */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the measurement was taken during */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the measurement in the context of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_measurements_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, guest) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role that the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission that the role has (e.g., view_data, edit_data) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_datasets" (
  "study_dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study dataset */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the dataset is associated with */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_type" TEXT /* Type of dataset (e.g., raw, processed) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_datasets_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_measurements" (
  "dataset_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset measurement */,
  "study_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the measurement is part of */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the measurement in the context of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_measurements_study_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_dataset_id") REFERENCES study_datasets ("study_dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the revision was made to */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "revision_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the revision */,
  "revised_by" TEXT /* User who made the revision */,
  "revised_from" TEXT /* Previous value or state before the revision */,
  "revised_to" TEXT /* New value or state after the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_revisions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES research_studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_revisions" (
  "measurement_revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement revision */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the revision was made to */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "revision_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the revision */,
  "revised_by" TEXT /* User who made the revision */,
  "revised_from" TEXT /* Previous value or state before the revision */,
  "revised_to" TEXT /* New value or state after the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_revisions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
